articles.title: AI-Ignited Power War: Where Does Korea Stand?
articles.description: Argues that AI competitiveness now hinges on securing stable, low-cost power and proposes a five-track policy agenda linking Korea's Energy Transition Plan with the new AI Data Center Act to avert 'AI hollowing-out.'
articles.title_en: AI-Ignited Power War: Where Does Korea Stand?
articles.title_ko: AI가 불붙인 전력 전쟁, 한국은 어디에 서 있나
articles.description_en: Argues that AI competitiveness now hinges on securing stable, low-cost power and proposes a five-track policy agenda linking Korea's Energy Transition Plan with the new AI Data Center Act to avert 'AI hollowing-out.'
articles.description_ko: AI 경쟁력이 이제 안정적이고 저렴한 전력 확보에 달려 있다고 보고, 에너지 전환 계획과 AI 데이터센터 관련 법제를 잇는 다섯 갈래 정책 과제를 제안한다.

articles.title: The Broadcasting and Telecommunications Development Fund Paradox: Does 'Development' Suppress Investment?
articles.description: Critiques how Korea's broadcasting development fund paradoxically harms industry investment, with cable TV operators paying 168.4% of profits while IPTV pays only 4.7%.
articles.title_en: The Broadcasting and Telecommunications Development Fund Paradox: Does 'Development' Suppress Investment?
articles.description_en: Critiques how Korea's broadcasting development fund paradoxically harms industry investment, with cable TV operators paying 168.4% of profits while IPTV pays only 4.7%.
articles.description_ko: 방송통신발전기금이 오히려 산업 투자를 위축시키는 구조를 비판한다. 종합유선방송사업자는 이익의 168.4%를 부담하는 반면 IPTV는 4.7%만 낸다는 점을 짚는다.

articles.title: Regulatory Legislation Doesn't Just Block Innovation—Small Business Owners' Livelihoods Also at a Cliff's Edge
articles.description: Argues that proposed shared kickboard regulations threaten thousands of small business operators who depend on the sharing economy for their livelihoods.
articles.title_en: Regulatory Legislation Doesn't Just Block Innovation—Small Business Owners' Livelihoods Also at a Cliff's Edge
articles.title_ko: 규제 입법은 혁신만 막지 않는다, 소상공인의 생계도 벼랑 끝에 선다
articles.description_en: Argues that proposed shared kickboard regulations threaten thousands of small business operators who depend on the sharing economy for their livelihoods.
articles.description_ko: 공유 킥보드 규제안이 공유경제에 생계를 기대는 수천 명의 소상공인을 위협한다고 주장한다.

articles.title: Direction of AI Transparency Regulation for Sustained K-Content Growth
articles.description: Proposes five regulatory principles for AI transparency that balance innovation with trust-building in Korea's growing entertainment sector.
articles.title_en: Direction of AI Transparency Regulation for Sustained K-Content Growth
articles.title_ko: K-콘텐츠의 지속 성장을 위한 AI 투명성 규제의 방향
articles.description_en: Proposes five regulatory principles for AI transparency that balance innovation with trust-building in Korea's growing entertainment sector.
articles.description_ko: 혁신과 신뢰 구축의 균형을 맞추는 AI 투명성 규제 다섯 가지 원칙을 제안한다.

articles.title: Media Industry Coexistence: Transmission Fee Guideline Reform as a Starting Point
articles.description: Examines the need for transmission fee guideline reforms to ensure sustainable coexistence in the media industry ecosystem.
articles.title_en: Media Industry Coexistence: Transmission Fee Guideline Reform as a Starting Point
articles.title_ko: 미디어 산업의 공존: 송출수수료 가이드라인 개편을 출발점으로
articles.description_en: Examines the need for transmission fee guideline reforms to ensure sustainable coexistence in the media industry ecosystem.
articles.description_ko: 미디어 산업 생태계의 지속가능한 공존을 위해 송출수수료 가이드라인 개편이 필요한 이유를 짚는다.

articles.title: Redesigning Media Governance in the Digital Transformation Era
articles.description: Proposes new frameworks for media governance structures adapted to the digital transformation era.
articles.title_en: Redesigning Media Governance in the Digital Transformation Era
articles.title_ko: 디지털 전환 시대, 미디어 거버넌스를 다시 설계하다
articles.description_en: Proposes new frameworks for media governance structures adapted to the digital transformation era.
articles.description_ko: 디지털 전환 시대에 맞는 미디어 거버넌스 구조의 새 틀을 제안한다.

articles.title: The New Formula in Global OTT Markets: What K-Content Has Proven
articles.description: Analyzes how Korean content has established new success patterns in global OTT platform markets.
articles.title_en: The New Formula in Global OTT Markets: What K-Content Has Proven
articles.title_ko: 글로벌 온라인 동영상 시장의 새 공식: K-콘텐츠가 증명한 것
articles.description_en: Analyzes how Korean content has established new success patterns in global OTT platform markets.
articles.description_ko: 한국 콘텐츠가 글로벌 온라인 동영상 플랫폼 시장에서 어떻게 새로운 성공 공식을 만들어냈는지 분석한다.

articles.title: In the AI Era, We Must Move Beyond Regulatory Frameworks to Accelerate Promotion
articles.description: Argues for shifting from regulatory-focused approaches to promotional strategies in AI policy development.
articles.title_en: In the AI Era, We Must Move Beyond Regulatory Frameworks to Accelerate Promotion
articles.title_ko: AI 시대, 규제의 틀을 넘어 진흥에 속도를 내야 한다
articles.description_en: Argues for shifting from regulatory-focused approaches to promotional strategies in AI policy development.
articles.description_ko: AI 정책에서 규제 중심 접근을 넘어 진흥 전략으로 무게중심을 옮겨야 한다고 주장한다.
